Name: TapeTech EasyClean Automatic Mini-Taper
Short description: The TapeTech Mini Taper has the quality and features you expect from TapeTech but now in a Limited Edition Mini size.
Description: The TapeTech Mini Taper has the quality and features you expect from TapeTech but now in a Limited Edition Mini size. You can expect great things to come in small packages with the the latest from TapeTech! Perfect for working in tight spaces where you can't fit a standard size taper! Mini Taper Length: 41 inches (104 cm) vs. Standard Taper length of 53 inches (134 cm). QUICK-CHANGE TAPE BAIL locks into place, making it easy to change tape rolls without having to put the taper down. Best of all, there are no loose parts to misplace or re-install. To change tape rolls, grasp the tape retainer wire near the end of the spool post and depress it down and out through the retainer slot. Swing the retainer wire up and out of the way, change tape rolls, sliding the new roll fully onto the spool post. Swing the retainer wire back down, and guide it into the retainer slot. It’s that simple! NO HASSLE CABLE CHANGES. The plunger stop has been improved to simplify cable changes. The metal and exposed screw heads have been replaced with a smooth, rounded, plastic plunger stop that is easy to remove and re-install. To remove the plunger stop, lift the locking tab and twist the stop ¼ turn counterclockwise. After twisting, pull the stop off the taper and complete the cable change following the normal procedure (see Cable Replacement). To re-install, align the guide tabs to the slots and slide the stop into the taper end, twisting ¼ turn clockwise. Continue twisting until the tab snaps into place, locking the assembly together. If oriented correctly, very little force should be required to install the stop. Changing a cable has never been easier! All TapeTech tools come with an industry-best 5-year limited warranty. Additionally, the tools can be serviced through All-Wall with 2 authorized warranty and repair locations.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Tapers

Name: TapeTech EasyClean Automatic Taper
Short description: TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Taper is the most advanced and enhanced drywall taping tool offered by TapeTech.
Description: TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Taper is the most advanced and enhanced drywall taping tool offered by TapeTech. EasyClean® lid releases with a quick turn of the single attachment screw, and makes clean-up and cable changes easier than ever. You can expect great TapeTech quality from the rest of the drywall gun as well! EASY GRIP CONTROL TUBE . The control tube has been lengthened 2.5" and glide wheels added to make tape cuts easier and more comfortable. The glide wheels are recessed into flanges at each end of the control tube, and act as stops for your hands - requiring much less grip-force to operate the cutter. QUICK-CHANGE TAPE BAIL locks into place, making it easy to change tape rolls without having to put the taper down. Best of all, there are no loose parts to misplace or re-install. To change tape rolls, grasp the tape retainer wire near the end of the spool post and depress it down and out through the retainer slot. Swing the retainer wire up and out of the way, change tape rolls, sliding the new roll fully onto the spool post. Swing the retainer wire back down, and guide it into the retainer slot. It’s that simple! NO HASSLE CABLE CHANGES. The plunger stop has been improved to simplify cable changes. The metal and exposed screw heads have been replaced with a smooth, rounded, plastic plunger stop that is easy to remove and re-install. To remove the plunger stop, lift the locking tab and twist the stop ¼ turn counterclockwise. After twisting, pull the stop off the taper and complete the cable change following the normal procedure (see Cable Replacement). To re-install, align the guide tabs to the slots and slide the stop into the taper end, twisting ¼ turn clockwise. Continue twisting until the tab snaps into place, locking the assembly together. If oriented correctly, very little force should be required to install the stop. Changing a cable has never been easier! NOW WITH ADJUSTABLE BRAKING SYSTEM! This new feature allows you to adjust the braking system for your personal preference. Now you have the control over the brake. It also can be adjusted tighter or looser to account for wear on your taper.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Tapers

Name: TapeTech Inside Corner Roller
Short description: TapeTech Corner Roller 15TTE The Corner Roller embeds drywall paper tape firmly into the corner, ideal for use immediately after applying joint tape to the internal corner with the Automatic Taper.
Description: TapeTech Corner Roller 15TTE The Corner Roller embeds drywall paper tape firmly into the corner, ideal for use immediately after applying joint tape to the internal corner with the Automatic Taper. In preparation for use with a corner finisher, the Corner Roller forces excess joint compound from behind the tape. Featuring a Stainless Steel rollers for durability and clean edges. For best results, Use with the Fiberglass Handle FHTT or the Extension Handle XHTT (sold separately). Features: Steel Rollers with Plastic Interior Provides Smooth Operation. Embeds Paper Tape Into 90º Internal Corner Joints On Walls and Ceilings. Lightweight and Fast Easy Clean Up

Name: TapeTech Outside Corner
Short description: TapeTech Mud Applicator Head 90º Outside 16TT Apply a consistent base coat of joint compound for the cleanest and most efficient installation of paper-faced corner bead.
Description: TapeTech Mud Applicator Head 90º Outside 16TT Apply a consistent base coat of joint compound for the cleanest and most efficient installation of paper-faced corner bead. The Mud Head applies the correct amount of joint compound to maximize adhesion and reduce clean up. Attach the 16TT Mud Head to a Corner Applicator (35TT or 50TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to simplify and accelerate installation of paper-faced corner bead for external (outside) drywall corners. Features: Attaches via locking clip to all brands of Angle Box, Mudrunner, TapeTech Mud Tubes, and Columbia Mud Tubes Heavy-duty plastic construction reduces friction, and promotes smooth application Works with nearly all shapes of outside paper-faced corner bead

Name: TapeTech 2" Corner Finisher
Short description: TapeTech 2" Angle Head Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass.
Description: TapeTech 2" Angle Head Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass. The corner finisher, also known as corner finisher, angle finisher, or glazer, is attached to a corner applicator, angle box, MudRunner® or angle head handle to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. An angle head can be used for any 90º inside drywall corner, at either wall or ceiling junctions, and embeds inside angle tape on walls and ceilings by smoothly feathering excess mud in internal corners. TapeTech Corner Finishers are spring loaded to help compensate for slight corner imperfections. The TapeTech 2" corner finisher angle head is ideal for tape coats and for finishing drywall projects with narrow door legs or window trim areas. Stainless steel frames provide many years of reliable service and positive ball retainer keeps angle head securely attached to angle box, Mudrunner or angle head handle, eliminating surprise disconnects or tool damage. Locking Clip Retainer Eliminates Damaging Disconnects. Perfect For Glazing Tape Coat Narrow Side Legs Welded Steel Frames Durable Nickel-Plating Die-cast aluminum body resists corrosion
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Corner Finishers

Name: TapeTech 3" EasyRoll Adjustable Corner Finisher
Short description: TapeTech 3" EasyRoll® Angle Head Reduces drag with easy rolling rubber-tired wheels.
Description: TapeTech 3" EasyRoll® Angle Head Reduces drag with easy rolling rubber-tired wheels. Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass. Integrated spring adjusters allow quick change of spring tension to suit any drywall finishing job. 3" EasyRoll angle head can also be attached to angle box, corner box or Mudrunner to apply final smooth feathered finish to inside drywall corner angles. Tape Tech Easy Roll 3" corner finishing tool glides smoothly in drywall corners due to reduced friction. Use angle head to feather inside 90 degree tape corners after applying with banjo, compound applicator or automatic taper. EasyRoll angle corner finisher can also be used to apply final smooth feathered finish coat of compound, by simply attaching to an angle box (also known as flusher box, hockey box or corner applicator). Convenient spring adjustment levers quickly allow change of tension preference. Firm spring adjustment is often used when final finishing inside drywall angles, and softer setting is popular when applying tape coat. The 3" EasyRoll corner finisher can be used both for applying tape as well as smooth skimming finish compound to inside 90 degree drywall angle corners. Convenient Spring Tension Levers Locking Clip Retainer Eliminates Damaging Disconnects EasyRoll Wheels With Rubber Tires Reduce Friction Evenly finishes Both Sides Of Inside 90 degree angles 5-Year Manufacturer's Warranty
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Corner Finishers

Name: TapeTech EasyClean Pump
Short description: TapeTech EasyClean® Loading Pump - 76TT Fills automatic drywall tools with joint compound through optional Gooseneck and Box Filler Fitting.
Description: TapeTech EasyClean® Loading Pump - 76TT Fills automatic drywall tools with joint compound through optional Gooseneck and Box Filler Fitting. The TapeTech Taping Tools Pump works with all major brand attachments and automatic taping and finishing tools. This pump features an Easy Clean® quick release foot valve has a twist-lock design for removal without tools. New integrated gasket design provides a better seal and makes disposable paper gaskets obsolete. The new streamlined head design makes cylinder removal and cleaning a breeze. Name: TapeTech Roller Cage
Short description: TapeTech 4" Compound Roller Frame CCAGE04 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming.
Description: TapeTech 4" Compound Roller Frame CCAGE04 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Key Features: Robust Design: Features a full 5/16” thick frame design – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames – and the most robust joint compound roller frame on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: When matched with a TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller, applies nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers and frames. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Extended Reach: Easily attaches to TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle to reach most common walls and ceilings without stilts or scaffolds. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives. Available in 4 sizes: TapeTech premium joint compound roller frames are available in 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch sizes plus an integrated 2-inch model that includes the roller and frame together.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Compound Rollers

Name: TapeTech 6" Carbon Steel Clipped Joint Knife
Short description: TapeTech 6" Carbon Steel Clipped Joint Knife TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex,.
Description: TapeTech 6" Carbon Steel Clipped Joint Knife TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. The handle’s over-sized, tapered shape provides the most ergonomic, slip-resistant grip. The enlarged, alloy hammer end allows it to be used to set protruding fasteners, adjust installation flaws, and protect against damage if the knife is dropped. Name: TapeTech Premium Compound Roller
Short description: TapeTech 2" Premium Inside Corner Compound Roller with Frame TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt.
Description: TapeTech 2" Premium Inside Corner Compound Roller with Frame TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. The 2" compound roller is perfect for applying joint compound to internal corners prior to using a corner flusher or finisher. This roller includes a specially designed extended roller frame; the roller is not replaceable. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity : TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

Name: TapeTech 7" EasyClean Box
Short description: TapeTech 7" EasyClean™ Flat Box EZ07TT The rigid design allows the flat box to apply just the right amount of drywall joint compound, feathering both edges at the same time.
Description: TapeTech 7" EasyClean™ Flat Box EZ07TT The rigid design allows the flat box to apply just the right amount of drywall joint compound, feathering both edges at the same time. The main extrusion strongly supports side plates for greater strength. Ideal for applying base coat to drywall flat seams, butt joints or corner beads, These boxes will also fit all major brands of flat box handles. The EasyRoll™ wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll™ wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. These wheels provide a shoulder to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without after-market attachments or damage to the axle. The shoulder of the EasyRoll™ wheels are more than three times wider than after-market products, making it easier to place, and keep the finishing box on the corner bead. EasyRoll™ wheels are engineered and designed to be perfectly aligned with the finishing blade, eliminating the need to tilt the finishing box like you must with common after-market wheel systems. Perfect For Base Coats On Flat Seams and Corner Bead. Description: TapeTech 4" Premium Carbon Steel Joint Knife TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. The handle’s over-sized, tapered shape provides the most ergonomic, slip-resistant grip. The enlarged, alloy hammer end allows it to be used to set protruding fasteners, adjust installation flaws, and protect against damage if the knife is dropped. TapeTech Premium Taping and Joint Knife blades are precision ground and polished to provide the perfect amount of flex and finish. The Carbon Steel and Blue Steel blades provide ultimate feel while Stainless Steel blades maximize rust resistance. TapeTech Premium Taping Knives feature the strongest backing plate in the industry, preventing unwanted blade deflection while providing smooth, consistent control and finish. Features: Premium Carbon Steel Blade Provides Precise Feathering and Smoothing Precision Grind Provides Perfect Flex and Finish Oversized, Tapered, Soft-Grip Handle Provides Optimal Control and Comfort Alloy Metal Hammer End Sets Protruding Fasteners, Adjusts Installation Flaws and Protects Against Damage From Drops. Easy-To-Remove Label Lifetime Limited Warranty
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Premium Taping Knives

Name: TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw
Short description: TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw The TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw is a heavy-duty cutting tool built for precision and durability.
Description: TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw The TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw is a heavy-duty cutting tool built for precision and durability. Featuring an extra-thick high carbon steel blade, this saw is designed to handle the toughest materials, including drywall, PVC, and cement board, with ease. The sharpened point allows for easy puncturing, making plunge cuts a breeze, while the triple ground hardened teeth ensure fast cutting and long-lasting performance. The saw's ergonomic handle provides a comfortable, secure grip, reducing fatigue during extended use. Ideal for professional contractors, the TapeTech jab saw is built for efficiency and reliability, delivering unmatched results in every cut. Features: Sharpened Point Extra-Thick High Carbon Steel Thick Ground Hardened Teeth Ergonomic Handle Perfect For Drywall, PVC, and Cement Board 8 TPI

Name: TapeTech MudRunner Pro
Short description: TapeTech MudRunner® Pro MR01TT The new second generation MudRunner® Pro tool applies joint compound to inside and outside corners faster and with precision control and minimal effort.
Description: TapeTech MudRunner® Pro MR01TT The new second generation MudRunner® Pro tool applies joint compound to inside and outside corners faster and with precision control and minimal effort. The new MudRunner® Pro offers a tremendous update in the efficiency of finishing corners in drywall. The tool offers more versatility when needed in adjustment to length, both integrated and with the MRX01TT extension (sold separately). The new MudRunner® Pro also offers a 20% increase in piston strength for greater compound application. Adjustable Length: 52.5" - 60.5" Use With Any Inside Or Outside Corner Finisher Thicker Mud Applies Effortlessly Clear Tube For Visible Mud Level Reduces Wear-and-Tear On Your Shoulders Requires A Pump/Filler To Fill Requires An Applicator Head To Apply/Finish
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > MudRunner Pro

Name: TapeTech Extension
Short description: The new MudRunner® Pro Extension allows the user to add 12" length to the MR01TT to reach higher spaces.
Description: The new MudRunner® Pro Extension allows the user to add 12" length to the MR01TT to reach higher spaces. The MRX01TT simply attaches by inserting the extrusion piece into the receiving port on the MR01TT and securing the clamps. The MRX01TT also has a receiving port to add multiple extensions. The New MudRunner® Pro Extension adds up to 20% more overall length to the MudRunner® Pro when installed. Due to the installment process, the extension becomes the "on/off" twisting lever for the tool.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > MudRunner Pro

Name: TapeTech 2" Nail Spotter
Short description: TapeTech 2" EasyClean® Nail Spotter NS02TT Allows you to spot ceilings without the use of stilts faster and more efficient than spotting nails by hand.
Description: TapeTech 2" EasyClean® Nail Spotter NS02TT Allows you to spot ceilings without the use of stilts faster and more efficient than spotting nails by hand. Featuring the EasyClean® Lid, quick release latch, and gasket system (similar to a flat box). This allows easy access and hassle-free clean up. This Nail Spotter gives you the flexibility for any size job, and is an ideal single spotter system. The traditional style skid plate is both a pivot point and a screw detector, which helps prevent blade damage. The spotter body is made of high quality stainless steel that will not rust or deteriorate. Each TapeTech Nail Spotter includes a Nail Spotter Adapter NSA-TT which attaches to both Interchangeable Fiberglass Handle FHTT (not included) and Interchangeable Extendable Handle XHTT (not included). Features: Spot Nails Faster and More Efficient EasyClean® Lid and Gasket for Quick Cleanup Durable Stainless Steel Construction Traditional Style Skid Plate Easily Attaches to Both FHTT and XHTT Interchangeable Handles Includes NSA-TT Nail Spotter Adapter
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Nail Spotters

Name: TapeTech Nailspotter Wheel Kit
Short description: TapeTech Nail Spotter Wheel Kit NSW01 This wheel kit is designed to make finishing faster, smoother, and less fatiguing.
Description: TapeTech Nail Spotter Wheel Kit NSW01 This wheel kit is designed to make finishing faster, smoother, and less fatiguing. Compatible with both the 2" and 3" TapeTech nail spotters, this kit adds durable wheels that glide effortlessly across the wall or ceiling surface. The wheels help maintain consistent pressure and reduce drag, allowing finishers to achieve clean, professional results with greater ease. Key Features: Universal Fit – Works with both 2" and 3" TapeTech Nail Spotters for maximum versatility. Smooth Rolling Action – High-quality wheels reduce surface drag, making spotting faster and easier. Consistent Finish – Helps maintain uniform pressure for more even compound application. Durable Construction – Built with long-lasting materials to withstand daily jobsite use. Reduced Fatigue – Less effort required to move across joints means more productivity with less strain.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Nail Spotters

Name: TapeTech 7" Power Assist MaxxBox
Short description: TapeTech 7" POWER ASSIST® MAXXBOX® PAHC07 Gives you the extra capacity you want in a high capacity Flat Box, with half the effort.
Description: TapeTech 7" POWER ASSIST® MAXXBOX® PAHC07 Gives you the extra capacity you want in a high capacity Flat Box, with half the effort. Save time and reduce fatigue by letting the tool do more of the work. Featuring a smart design that matches the usable capacity to the application. The TapeTech Power Assist® finishing box holds just the right amount of joint compound to keep you finishing longer without wearing you out. The POWER ASSIST® MAXXBOX® is sure to become the industry standard for finishing! Adjustable dial crown setting allows the user to easily apply just the right amount of compound over flat seams and butt joints on walls and ceilings. These boxes work with all major brand flat box handles, including the Wizard™ handle for Power Assist® boxes 8000TT-PA (not included). Flat box brake handle controls position of MAXXBOX® to activate the POWER ASSIST® mechanism. Pressure plate reverse spring setup then helps apply the joint compound. MAXXBOX® high capacity holds more mud compound, saving you trips back and forth to the the pump for refills, increasing your production ability. Perfect For Base Coats on Flat Seams, Butt Joints and Cornerbeads Pivoting Axle Adjusts To Any Drywall Surface Adjustable Crown Control For Correct Compound Output Designed To Improve Speed and Efficiency Reverse Springs For Power Assisted Finishing EasyClean Pressure Plate For Fast Cleanup High Mud Compound Capacity
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Power Assist MaxxBox

Name: TapeTech 6.5" QuickBox Finishing Box
Short description: TapeTech QuickBox QSX 6.5" Finishing Box QuickBox™ QSX - is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds (hot mud).
Description: TapeTech QuickBox QSX 6.5" Finishing Box QuickBox™ QSX - is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds (hot mud). Combine the speed of same day multi-coat hot mud with ATF flat box consistent finish! The 6 ½” QuickBox™ QSX is the perfect tool for drywallers who prefer to use fast-setting joint compound when embedding the joint tape. The QuickBox™ QSX works with paper tape, fiberglass tape or the new fiber joint tapes. The QuickBox™ QSX can be used for a wide variety of applications - Tape Embed, Nail Spot, Flex Trim Coating, Tight Area, Short Runs, and more. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox™ QSX with a few light taps. QuickBox™ QSX features: A glass-filled polypropylene shell that provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. Large wheels to roll easily over any type of gypsum panels Pressure plate that opens completely for easy filling and cleaning. The box can be filled easily with the pump, the compound tube or by hand An optimized blade design that matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. Tool-free design for ultra-fast blade changes. Works with all TapeTech and major brand finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Includes two blades (QB6003 standard and QB6023 crown)
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > QuickBox QSX

Name: TapeTech Extension Handle
Short description: TapeTech Interchangeable Extendable Support Handle XHTT An interchangeable, extendable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters!
Description: TapeTech Interchangeable Extendable Support Handle XHTT An interchangeable, extendable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters! The base handle XHTT fits the corner roller without adapters, as well as the new design corner applicator and nail spotter without adapters. The new, optimal 1.25" diameter makes TapeTech XHTT handles the most ergonomic in the industry. The XHTT features a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Features: Single Handle With Attachments For A Variety Of Tools D-Shaped Fitting Eliminates Corner Box Movement Comfortable and Ergonomic Extendable from 43"-77" Lightweight Only 2.15lbs 1.25" Diameter Handle Fitments and Adapters: The Corner Applicator Adapter (CAA-TT) The Nail Spotter Adapter (NSA-TT) Corner Finisher/ Angle Head Adapter (CFA-TT) Corner Applicator/ Angle Box Handle Adapter (CAA-TT) Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the new handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter. If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter. If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Support Handles
